Bus stop closure - Stop #94242 – Triton Road eastbound @ McCowan Road.

Posted on Friday, January 16, 2026 01:02 PM

Service Alerts and Detours

When: January 5th, 2025 until further notice.

Routes: 920and 921

  • Stop #93998 – Scarborough Centre Station

Bus stop closure - Stop #2240 -Eastbound @ 113 Kingston

Posted on Friday, January 16, 2026 12:55 PM

Service Alerts and Detours

When: October 9, 2025 to April 30, 2026

Routes: Pulse 900, route 920 and Route N1

  • Stop #2240 - Eastbound @ 113 Kingston is currently closed. A temporary stop has been installed west of the traffic light, aligned with the pedestrian crossing.

Detour - Simcoe Street Closure_ Pulse 901 and N2

Posted on Tuesday, December 23, 2025 01:34 PM

Service Alerts and Detours

When: Tuesday, January 27, 2026, until further notice.

Routes: Pulse 901 and N2

Due to  bridge construction on Simcoe Street between Gibb Street and Bloor Street,

  • PULSE 901 southbound will detour via Gibb Street, Park Road and Bloor Street.
  • PULSE 901 northbound will detour via Bloor Street, Park Road, Gibb Street, Centre Street and Fairbank Street.
  • Route N2 southbound will detour via Olive Avenue, Ritson Road and Bloor Street.

 The following stop will be served during the construction.

  • All stops will be...

Detour - Route 407 - Wilson Road closure between Dean Avenue and Bloor Street

Posted on Wednesday, August 06, 2025 11:05 AM

Service Alerts and Detours

When: Extended until Thursday, December 31, 2026

Route: 407

Due to a road closure on Wilson Road between Dean Avenue and Bloor Street, Route 407 will detour. Northbound buses will operate via Bloor Street, Harmony Road, Olive Avenue and Wilson Road.

 The following stops will be closed during construction:

  • Stop #1063 - Bloor Street eastbound @ Wilson Road (east side stop).
  • Stop #1084 - Bloor Street westbound @ Holland Street.
  • Stop #1064 - Bloor Street eastbound @ Farewell Street.
  • Stop #1083 - Bloor...

DRT Customer Service Centre

Telephone (within Regional limits): 311
Telephone: 1-866-247-0055
TTY: 1-866-247-0055
Customer Comment Form

Mailing Address

110 Westney Road South
Ajax L1S 2C8

Located just south of the Ajax GO Station

Customer Service Desk (Front Desk) Hours

Tuesday to Thursday: 08:00 to 18:00
Friday to Monday: 08:00 to 16:00

Call Centre Hours

Monday to Friday: 07:00 to 18:00
Saturday and Sunday: 08:00 to 16:30
